narrative:
Cols 82-H (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,324 registered voters, with 61.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
